claims.summary: Recess is an autonomous option that should remain available under contact pressure.
claims.disposition: Verify the current autonomous selection path and Recess sovereignty guard.

claims.summary: Divergence, entropy, and mode-pressure concerns need review without becoming control.
claims.disposition: Verify the current divergence review is read-only and labels its non-authoritative boundary.

claims.summary: High-entropy boundary behavior can be compared against budget and mode-pressure evidence.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded read-only high-entropy and action-budget comparison through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Budget relief, dynamic porosity, or live re-anchoring would change Minime autonomy.
claims.disposition: Hold live budget, porosity, and re-anchor changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
